name: MegaMan Battle Network 3
description: Play as Lan and MegaMan to stop the evil organization WWW led by the nefarious Dr.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Extra Ranks
options.description: How many extra Undernet Ranks to add to the pool in place of filler items.

options.label: Include Jobs
options.description: Whether Jobs can contain progression or useful items.

options.label: Include Secret
options.description: Whether the Secret Area (including Serenade) can contain progression or useful items.

options.label: Trade Quest Hinting
options.description: Whether NPCs offering Chip Trades should show what item they provide.
